neighborhoods.name: Cascais Centro
neighborhoods.description: Former royal fishing village with elegant center, marina, and direct train connection to Lisbon
neighborhoods.character: Elegant coastal, royal heritage, Lisbon train-connected

housing.predominantType: Apartments in elegant buildings and converted properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Cascais. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Estoril
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent town with famous casino, beach, and Formula 1 heritage
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Cascais's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Sintra
neighborhoods.description: UNESCO romantic hill town with fairy-tale palaces and lower costs than Cascais
neighborhoods.character: UNESCO romantic, palaces, cooler hill climate
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Carcavelos / Sao Joao do Estoril
neighborhoods.description: Beach communities between Lisbon and Cascais with surf culture and international schools
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
